scenes.text: From across the mountains, a young prince arrived at the gates of Daha. His name was Raden Inu Kertapati, crown prince of Kahuripan.
When the prince saw Candra Kirana, his heart was decided. And the king, seeing the goodness in both of them, gave his blessing.
The kingdom celebrated. But in the shadow of the festivities, one pair of eyes burned with envy.
